evals.expected_output: 识别 CHIP token (CoinGecko ID: usd-ai)，通过 /original/ 路径获取高清源图，检测背景为 has_border（金色边框），生成 4 个无描边文件到 ~/Downloads/
assertions: Identified token symbol as CHIP from the CoinGecko page
Used /original/ path for highest resolution source (2000px+)
Dual-radius background detection classified as has_border (edge lum differs from inner)
Generated 4 files: CHIP-light.svg, CHIP-dark.svg, CHIP-light.png, CHIP-dark.png
No stroke on either light or dark version (has_border classification)
PNG edges are anti-aliased (4x supersampling, >100 unique alpha values)

evals.expected_output: 识别 GENIUS token (CMC ID: 39841)，检测背景为纯黑（edge lum < 30），light 版无描边，dark 版白色描边贴边无黑圈
assertions: Extracted CMC coin ID 39841 from Jina Reader scrape
Parsed symbol as GENIUS from page title
Background detected as black (edge lum < 30, no border diff)
GENIUS-dark.png has white stroke flush with circle edge (no dark gap)

evals.expected_output: 识别 TSLA (RWA token)，正确使用 /rwa/ 路径而非 /coins/ 路径获取 logo，检测背景为 other（红色），无描边
assertions: Used /rwa/ image path (not /coins/) for the RWA page
Did NOT accidentally use a sidebar coin logo (e.g., Solana)
Parsed symbol as TSLA from page title
Background detected as other (lum ~89, mid-tone red)
Generated 4 files: TSLA-light.svg, TSLA-dark.svg, TSLA-light.png, TSLA-dark.png
